background: Determine whether the boldface numbers in the exercise represent a parameter or a statistic. The context involves new cases of female breast cancer in California in 2005 and their survival rates by stage of diagnosis.

task.query: Is 18,800 a parameter or a statistic?
Is 92% (the 7-year survival rate for stage I breast cancer) a parameter or a statistic?
Is 71% (the 7-year survival rate for stage II breast cancer) a parameter or a statistic?
Is 39% (the 7-year survival rate for stage III breast cancer) a parameter or a statistic?
Is 11% (the 7-year survival rate for stage IV breast cancer) a parameter or a statistic?
